zh.lifeSummary: Philip Nebaud是William Denebaud和Alice or Agnes Hereward的兒子，於1239年出生在英國薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治。他和Cicely Grindham至少有2個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1316年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Philip Nebaud was born in 1239, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England as the son of William Denebaud and Alice or Agnes Hereward. He had at least 2 sons and 7 daughters with Cicely Grindham. He died in 1316, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

ko.Hinton Saint George, Chard, Somerset, En: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지
ko.lifeSummary: Philip Nebaud(은)는 1239년 영국 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 William Denebaud(와)과 Alice or Agnes Hereward의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Cicely Grindham(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Philip Nebaud родился в 1239 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия. Его родителей звали William Denebaud и Alice or Agnes Hereward. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей от Cicely Grindham. Он умер в 1316 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.
